title: ApiResponse
description: Standard success envelope returned by every omiiCARE REST endpoint. Matches com.omiicare.qa.shared.api.ApiResponse. Errors use RFC 7807 ProblemDetail instead and are NOT validated by this schema.

success.description: Always true for this envelope; failures use ProblemDetail.

data.description: The payload. Type depends on the endpoint (object, array, or scalar). May be null for 204-style success.

correlationId.description: Request correlation id propagated from MDC; ties the response to audit and log entries.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 instant (UTC) when the response was produced.
